model_proba_error_sim.policy: signed_error = random_sign * max(normal(mean_abs_diff, max_abs_diff/3), 0.0); p_simulated = clip(p_raw + signed_error); prob_shrink applied after simulated model error

cv_meta.scoring_formula: fold_score = mean_log_growth - 0.20 * max_drawdown - 0.05 * avg_fraction, scenario_score = 0.50 * mean(fold_scores) + 0.30 * q10(fold_scores) + 0.20 * min(fold_scores), trial_score = 0.50 * mean(scenario_scores) + 0.30 * q10(scenario_scores) + 0.20 * min(scenario_scores), if total scenario trades == 0: scenario_score = -1e9
